rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §33.055, which governs use of student fingerprint cards and photographs in criminal/juvenile proceedings. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A child's fingerprint card made under Section 33.053 or a photograph of a child made or kept under Section 33.054 may not be used as evidence in any criminal proceeding in which the child is a defendant
_note: Rule text concerns school security records; no nexus to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
